Left Frontal Lobe.Shape: Large convex anterior lobe with superior and inferior frontal gyri
Left Frontal Lobe.Location: Anterior left hemisphere anterior to central sulcus extending to midline
Left Frontal Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray darker than deep frontal white matter on T1

Right Frontal Lobe.Shape: Large convex anterior lobe with broad prefrontal gyri and orbital surface
Right Frontal Lobe.Location: Anterior right hemisphere anterior to central sulcus extending to midline
Right Frontal Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray darker than deep frontal white matter on T1

Left Parietal Lobe.Shape: Quadrangular dorsal lobe with superior and inferior parietal regions
Left Parietal Lobe.Location: Left superior posterior hemisphere between frontal and occipital lobes
Left Parietal Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray slightly hypointense to underlying white matter

Right Parietal Lobe.Shape: Broad dorsal posterior lobe with supramarginal and angular regions
Right Parietal Lobe.Location: Right superior posterior hemisphere between frontal and occipital lobes
Right Parietal Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray slightly hypointense to underlying white matter

Left Temporal Lobe.Shape: Elongated curved lobe following lateral sulcus
Left Temporal Lobe.Location: Inferolateral left hemisphere inferior to Sylvian fissure
Left Temporal Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray darker than subcortical white matter on T1

Right Temporal Lobe.Shape: Elongated curved lobe with prominent superior and middle temporal gyri
Right Temporal Lobe.Location: Inferolateral right hemisphere inferior to Sylvian fissure
Right Temporal Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray darker than subcortical white matter on T1

Left Limbic System.Shape: C shaped medial complex encircling corpus callosum and hippocampus
Left Limbic System.Location: Left medial hemisphere including cingulate and parahippocampal regions
Left Limbic System.Intensity_Profile: Mixed gray signal with bright white matter tracts on T1

Right Limbic System.Shape: C shaped medial complex surrounding callosal and hippocampal structures
Right Limbic System.Location: Right medial hemisphere including cingulate and parahippocampal regions
Right Limbic System.Intensity_Profile: Mixed gray signal with bright white matter tracts on T1

Left Occipital Lobe.Shape: Posterior tapering lobe forming occipital pole
Left Occipital Lobe.Location: Left posterior hemisphere behind parieto occipital sulcus
Left Occipital Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray hypointense to occipital white matter on T1

Right Occipital Lobe.Shape: Posterior wedge shaped lobe forming visual pole
Right Occipital Lobe.Location: Right posterior hemisphere behind parieto occipital sulcus
Right Occipital Lobe.Intensity_Profile: Cortical gray hypointense to occipital white matter on T1

Left Insula.Shape: Triangular cortical plate with short and long gyri
Left Insula.Location: Deep within left lateral sulcus covered by frontal and temporal opercula
Left Insula.Intensity_Profile: Gray is isointense to neocortex darker than insular white matter

Right Insula.Shape: Triangular cortical plate forming deep lateral cortical island
Right Insula.Location: Deep within right lateral sulcus under opercular regions
Right Insula.Intensity_Profile: Gray is isointense to neocortex darker than insular white matter

Left Basal Ganglia.Shape: Clustered lentiform and caudate gray nuclei
Left Basal Ganglia.Location: Left deep hemisphere lateral to thalamus and internal capsule
Left Basal Ganglia.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate gray signal between cortex and white matter

Right Basal Ganglia.Shape: Clustered lentiform and caudate gray nuclei with globus pallidus
Right Basal Ganglia.Location: Right deep hemisphere lateral to thalamus and internal capsule
Right Basal Ganglia.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate gray signal between cortex and white matter

Left Thalamus.Location: Left diencephalon lateral to third ventricle below fornix
Left Thalamus.Intensity_Profile: Deep gray slightly hypointense to perithalamic white matter

Right Thalamus.Location: Right diencephalon lateral to third ventricle below fornix
Right Thalamus.Intensity_Profile: Deep gray slightly hypointense to perithalamic white matter

Left Basal Forebrain.Shape: Irregular ventral forebrain region with small gray clusters
Left Basal Forebrain.Location: Left inferior frontal area near septal nuclei and anterior commissure
Left Basal Forebrain.Intensity_Profile: Gray intensity similar to striatum hypointense to white matter

Right Basal Forebrain.Shape: Irregular ventral forebrain region surrounding septal and preoptic areas
Right Basal Forebrain.Location: Right inferior frontal area near anterior commissure
Right Basal Forebrain.Intensity_Profile: Gray intensity similar to striatum hypointense to white matter

Left Midbrain.Shape: Compact cylindrical segment with cerebral peduncle and tectum
Left Midbrain.Location: Left brainstem between diencephalon and pons
Left Midbrain.Intensity_Profile: Mixed T1 signal white tracts brighter than gray nuclei

Right Midbrain.Shape: Compact cylindrical segment with collicular surface
Right Midbrain.Location: Right brainstem between diencephalon and pons
Right Midbrain.Intensity_Profile: Mixed T1 signal white tracts brighter than gray nuclei

Right Cerebellum.Shape: Rounded lobulated posterior structure with folial pattern
Right Cerebellum.Location: Right cerebellar hemisphere posterior to brainstem
Right Cerebellum.Intensity_Profile: Cerebellar cortex hypointense to internal white matter on T1

Left Cerebellum.Shape: Rounded lobulated posterior structure with dense folia
Left Cerebellum.Location: Left cerebellar hemisphere posterior to brainstem
Left Cerebellum.Intensity_Profile: Cerebellar cortex hypointense to internal white matter on T1

Left Pons.Shape: Rounded ventral brainstem segment with transverse fibers
Left Pons.Location: Left pontine region between midbrain and medulla
Left Pons.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal fibers brighter than pontine nuclei

Right Pons.Shape: Rounded ventral brainstem segment with basal groove
Right Pons.Location: Right pontine region between midbrain and medulla
Right Pons.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal fibers brighter than pontine nuclei

Left Medulla Oblongata.Shape: Tapered caudal brainstem with ventral pyramids
Left Medulla Oblongata.Location: Left medullary region between pons and cervical cord
Left Medulla Oblongata.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal pyramids brighter than adjacent gray

Right Medulla Oblongata.Shape: Tapered caudal brainstem with dorsal bulge
Right Medulla Oblongata.Location: Right medullary region between pons and cervical cord
Right Medulla Oblongata.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal pyramids brighter than adjacent gray

Left Frontal White Matter.Shape: Dense subcortical white matter beneath frontal cortex
Left Frontal White Matter.Location: Left centrum semiovale anterior to lateral ventricle
Left Frontal White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Bright homogeneous T1 signal higher than cortical gray

Right Frontal White Matter.Shape: Dense subcortical white matter beneath frontal cortex
Right Frontal White Matter.Location: Right centrum semiovale anterior to lateral ventricle
Right Frontal White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Bright homogeneous T1 signal higher than cortical gray

Left Posterior White Matter.Location: Left posterior centrum semiovale near atrium
Left Posterior White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Uniformly hyperintense on T1 relative to gray matter

Right Posterior White Matter.Location: Right posterior centrum semiovale near atrium
Right Posterior White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Uniformly hyperintense on T1 relative to gray matter

Left Corpus Callosum.Shape: C shaped interhemispheric white matter bridge
Left Corpus Callosum.Location: Left midline region above lateral ventricle
Left Corpus Callosum.Intensity_Profile: Strongly hyperintense on T1 due to dense myelination

Right Corpus Callosum.Shape: C shaped interhemispheric white matter bridge
Right Corpus Callosum.Location: Right midline region above lateral ventricle
Right Corpus Callosum.Intensity_Profile: Strongly hyperintense on T1 due to dense myelination

Left Inferior White Matter.Shape: Compact ventral white matter tract system
Left Inferior White Matter.Location: Left basal frontal and temporal stem regions
Left Inferior White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Uniformly bright on T1 relative to cortical gray

Right Inferior White Matter.Shape: Compact ventral white matter tract system
Right Inferior White Matter.Location: Right basal frontal and temporal stem regions
Right Inferior White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Uniformly bright on T1 relative to cortical gray

Left Limbic White Matter.Shape: Curved association tract within limbic lobe
Left Limbic White Matter.Location: Left cingulate and parahippocampal white matter region

Right Limbic White Matter.Shape: Curved association tract within limbic lobe
Right Limbic White Matter.Location: Right cingulate and parahippocampal white matter region

Left Lateral Ventricle.Shape: C shaped CSF cavity with frontal and temporal horns
Left Lateral Ventricle.Location: Left deep hemisphere surrounding caudate and thalamus
Left Lateral Ventricle.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 forming smooth cavity border

Right Lateral Ventricle.Shape: C shaped CSF cavity with frontal and temporal horns
Right Lateral Ventricle.Location: Right deep hemisphere surrounding caudate and thalamus
Right Lateral Ventricle.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 forming smooth cavity border

Third Ventricle.Location: Between left and right thalami beneath fornix
Third Ventricle.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 separating deep gray structures

Fourth Ventricle.Shape: Diamond shaped cavity between pons and cerebellum
Fourth Ventricle.Location: Midline posterior fossa ventral to cerebellum
Fourth Ventricle.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 forming bright fluid interface
